repo_prior_art.cite: pid_ordinal_principal_strata/v1: sharp finite-support adjacent-chain bounds as the image of the posterior LP

published_prior_art.cite: none; published principal-score papers identify under PI rather than state the parent LP image

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_ordinal_principal_strata/v1: generic compatibility facets from a shared middle stratum, but not the named C_mid normal and rational endpoint

published_prior_art.cite: LuZhangDing2020 gives ordinal-treatment-effect endpoint constructions, not a principal-strata shared-middle facet

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_ordinal_principal_strata/v1: strict edgewise nonrectangularity, but not a named Phi_mid phase scalar

published_prior_art.cite: DingLu2017 and TongKahanHarhayLi2025 do not characterize a K=3 ordinal compatibility phase

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: LuZhangDing2020 is cited only as a broad endpoint-construction comparator, with no section/equation/page anchor tying it to the specific missing C_mid facet.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: DingLu2017 and TongKahanHarhayLi2025 are used as flagship comparators without location-level anchors for the alleged uncharacterized ordinal phase gap.

novelty_flags.label: §1/§8 comparator promises
novelty_flags.one_line: The handoff promises strict tightening of DingLu2017, LuZhangDing2020, and TongKahanHarhayLi2025, but no §8 headline is phrased as a strict tightening, iff frontier, or non-representability result against those published claims.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: T_mid(P,pi,Gamma), T_pair(P,pi,Gamma), and Phi_mid(P,pi,Gamma) are only concretely defined in the symmetric witness; the general phase-neighborhood statement lacks the endpoint maps it quantifies over.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: Phi_mid is defined as pairwise endpoint minus coherent endpoint, so 'Phi_mid > 0 iff the pairwise endpoint exceeds the coherent endpoint' is mostly an unfold unless Phi_mid gets an independent characterization.

soundness_flags.label: Corollary 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The PI corner says the phase scalar is zero at Gamma=1, but the displayed symmetric formula gives Phi_mid(1)=1/6, so the claimed corner reduction does not match the algebra as written.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define T_mid(P,pi,Gamma) and T_pair(P,pi,Gamma) for the general local cell, or explicitly downgrade Conjecture 2 to the symmetric witness plus a separate open extension.
Replace the tautological phase iff with an independent characterization, such as an active-basis inequality in observable cell primitives whose sign equals the phase.

Add exact published anchors for each flagship comparator, e.g. the section/equation in LuZhangDing2020 that supplies the endpoint-construction benchmark and the section in TongKahanHarhayLi2025 where the odds-ratio sensitivity object is defined.

Fix the Gamma=1 corner by either rescaling the pairwise relaxation onto the same full-cell coordinate system or stating that the pairwise endpoint formula is only for Gamma>1 and has no PI-continuous extension.

recommended_next_step: Revise Conjecture 2 first: make the phase scalar independently defined and repair the Gamma=1 sanity check before polishing the literature anchors.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The draft does isolate the parent bundled nonrectangularity mechanism via C_mid, a witness, and Phi_mid, but the current formulation is field-tier until the phase object is made non-tautological and fully defined.
